verses.text: Tua ahih manin Pasian' sapna a ngah mi siangthote aw, eite' upna thu tawh kisai-ah Siampi Lianpen a sem dingin Pasian' sawltak Jesuh' thu ngaihsun dih un
Pasian' innsungah na a sepna-ah Moses a cihtak mah bangin hih siampi nasep a sem dingin a seh Pasian' tungah Jesuh a citak hi
Ahi zongin inn a lampa pen a inn sangin a minthan'zawk mah bangin Moses sangin Jesuh pahtawizawk ding ahi hi
Inn khempeuh a lam na om ciat sam a, ahi zongin na khempeuh a piangsakpa pen Pasian ahi hi
Moses pen nasem khat hihna tawh Pasian' innsungah thu khempeuhah citak a, mailam hunah Pasian in a gen ding thute a gen hi
Ahi zongin Khrih pen Pasian' innsung a uk Tapa ahihna tawh a citak ahi hi. I lametna thu tawh kisai-in lungsim han'na leh muan'na tawh i omsuak nak leh eite pen Pasian' inn ihi hi.
Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Tu ni-in Pasian' aw na zak uh leh
gamlakah na om lai-un amah ze-etin, Pasian na lehdo lai hun uh bangin na lungsim uh khauhsak nawn kei un
Na pu na pate un kum sawmli sung ka nasepnate mu napi-in kei hong ze-et veve uh hi
Tua ahih manin amaute tungah ka heh a, ‘Amaute citaklo niloh uh a, ka thukhamte zui nuamlo uh hi,’ ka ci hi
Ka heh manin ka kiciam a, ‘Ka tawlngakna munah hong pai-in kei tawh hong tawlnga khawm ngeilo ding uh hi,’ ka ci hi,” na ci hi
Sanggamte aw, a nungta Pasian kiang panin a paikhia zah dingin thu umlo, a gilo na omkhak lohna dingun na kingaihsun un
Lai Siangtho in, “Tu ni,” a cih pen eite tungah zong hong cihna hi lai ahih manin mawhna' khemsa-in ta-in na lungsim uh na khauhsakkhak lohna dingun khatlekhat kihanthawnin na kihuhzaw un
A kipat tungin i neih lungmuan'na kiptakin i let ciat nak leh i vekpi-in Khrih tawh pawlkhat ihi hi
Lai Siangtho in, “Tuni-in Pasian' aw na zak uh leh Pasian na lehdo lai uh hun bangin na lungsim uh khauhsak nawn kei un,” na ci hi
Pasian' aw za napi-in amah a lehdo kuate ahi hiam? Moses in Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih mi khempeuh ahi uh hi
Kum sawmli sung kuate tungah Pasian heh ahi hiam? Mawhna bawlin, gamlakah a si mite tung ahi hi
Thupi takin Pasian kiciamin, “Ka tawlngakna munah hong pai-in, kei tawh tawlnga ngeilo ding uh hi,” a cih ciangin kuate a cih nopna ahi hiam? Amah a lehdote a cihna ahi hi
Tua ahih manin a uplohna uh hangin tawlngakna munah a lutzawh lohna uh i thei hi.
